title: An Order Extending the Effectivity of Executive Order No. 48, Series of 2021 Imposing Restrictions and Strict Observance under the Modified Enhanced Community Quarantine (MECQ) from 08 September until 30 September 2021 unless Otherwise Lifted or Extended by the President and the National Inter-Agency Task Force for Emerging Infectious Disease (IATF-MEID) in the Municipality of Los Baños.
